## Summary

Describe the change and the motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or CI
- [ ] Research script or generated-output workflow

## Verification

Commands run:

```bash

```

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention affected models, observables, optimization paths, generated artifacts,
or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] I based this work on `master` or a current topic branch.
- [ ] I used a descriptive branch name.
- [ ] I documented new public behavior or workflow changes.
- [ ] I avoided committing large generated outputs unless intentionally needed.
